en: I enjoy swimming.
She finished doing her homework.
He does not mind waiting.
We kept walking.
She avoided talking to him.
He suggested going to the beach.
I considered changing my job.
She practiced playing the piano.
He gave up learning French.
We enjoyed walking in the park.
I want to go to the library.
She hopes to become a doctor.
He decided to study English.
We plan to travel.
She promised to come back early.
He refused to apologize.
I learned to swim.
She managed to solve the problem.
He stopped to take a rest.
She stopped crying.
I remember turning off the lights.
Please remember to turn off the lights.

zh: 他试着打开门，但失败了。
en: He tried opening the door but failed.
She tried to open the door with the key.
I forgot to bring my homework.

zh: 我忘记我已经做过这道题了。
en: I forgot doing this exercise before.

zh: 游泳是一项很好的运动。
en: Swimming is a great sport.
He is good at drawing.
She is interested in learning languages.
I am looking forward to seeing you.
